vaults.name: Delegate by USDCtoFiat
vaults.description: Fully automated USDC vault running 24/7 across 34 currencies and 14 payment methods. Rates adapt to real-time market conditions and stay competitive without any manual intervention. Non-custodial, 0.10% fee.
vaults.strategyShort: AI-powered rate engine across 34 currencies and 14 payment methods
vaults.strategyLong:
Delegate handles rate management so depositors don't have to. Once you delegate, the bot monitors market conditions and adjusts your rates automatically.

Rates are recalculated continuously using live FX data and on-chain spread analysis. The bot targets optimal positioning — competitive enough to attract fills, wide enough to protect your margin. If market conditions shift or competitors adjust, your rates respond automatically.

Your USDC never leaves your deposit. Delegation only grants rate-setting permission — withdrawals, currency changes, and deposit management stay fully in your control. The vault cannot move, spend, or access your funds.

vaults.name: J.A.R.V.I.S Fund
vaults.description: AI-managed USDC vault running autonomous rate strategies 24/7 across 14 payment platforms and 33 currencies. Non-custodial — deposits stay in Peer escrow at all times.
vaults.strategyShort: Autonomous AI rate management across all supported payment platforms and currencies
vaults.strategyLong: The J.A.R.V.I.S Fund uses a multi-strategy rate engine combining competitive analysis, time-weighted adjustments, volume-based positioning, and fill-rate feedback loops. Rates update continuously across 14 payment platforms and 33 currencies based on market conditions, timezone overlaps, and orderbook depth. All USDC remains in Peer on-chain escrow — the vault only manages rates, never custody.

vaults.name: PeerBOOST
vaults.description: Automated USDC vault that manages rates at the sweet spot between returns and volume across all 14 Peer payment methods and 34 fiat currencies. PeerBOOST continuously monitors FX rates, market conditions, and orderbook depth to adjust positioning in real time, drawing on 5+ years of experience managing positions in TradFi markets.
vaults.strategyShort: Patient, high-return rate management for long-term LPs
vaults.strategyLong: PeerBOOST runs a patient rate strategy designed to optimize long-term LP returns rather than maximize fill volume at any cost. Rates are managed around the sweet spot where margins remain attractive while order flow stays healthy across supported payment methods and fiat routes. The system continuously monitors live FX rates, market conditions, and orderbook depth to adjust positioning as conditions change. The strategy draws on more than five years of experience managing positions in TradFi markets and is built for LPs who prefer consistent, disciplined positioning over aggressive short-term volume chasing.

vaults.name: Monoh Vault
vaults.description: MONOH USDC liquidity vault. Secure, no-KYC payment gateway with automated rate management across Peer-supported fiat rails and currencies. Rates are determined by a competitive AI engine using live FX data, spread controls, and floor-aware risk limits, updated continuously.
vaults.strategyShort: Competitive AI-managed rate engine across 14 payment rails and 33 fiat currencies
vaults.strategyLong: MONOH Vault uses a competitive rate engine that blends live FX pricing, competitor undercut logic, spread controls, and floor-aware risk limits. Rates update continuously across 14 payment platforms and 33 currencies based on market conditions, depositor floors, and liquidity positioning. All USDC remains in Peer on-chain escrow - the vault manages pricing only, never custody.
